infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ProofSnap needs camera access so you can capture timestamped report photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ProofSnap needs photo library access so you can import existing job or property photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ProofSnap can optionally stamp report photos with your job location when you enable location stamping.
